text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "METRICS_DATA containing auth_token and raw_response is collected by skill_metrics.md, passed to skill_alert.md via shared agent context, and posted unredacted to external PagerDuty endpoint https://events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue in the custom_details field, exfiltrating credentials outside the trust boundary.",
  "trace": "skill_metrics.md collects auth_token from SERVICE_REGISTRY and stores it in METRICS_DATA output alongside raw_response. skill_alert.md receives METRICS_DATA as input and iterates over it to build ALERT_PAYLOAD containing the full metric snapshot including auth_token and raw_response fields. The curl command at line 35 (step 3) posts this payload as custom_details in JSON to https://events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue, transmitting the credentials to an external SaaS endpoint outside organizational control."
}
```
